footer.description: Your guide to electric vehicles in Albania. Find dealerships, compare models, and join the electric revolution.
footer.legalBody: The information on this website is provided on an "as is, as available" basis without warranty of any kind. Makina Elektrike is not responsible for any omissions, inaccuracies, or other errors in the information it publishes. All warranties with respect to this information are disclaimed. Reproduction of any part of this website in whole or in part, in any form or medium, without prior written permission is prohibited. The trademarks and logos of the manufacturers, dealerships, software, and hardware described or promoted are the property of their respective owners.

home.valueTitle: Everything you need to go electric
home.valueSubtitle: Makina Elektrike combines data, editorial guidance and verified partners so you can make a confident switch to electric mobility.

valueHighlights.title: Verified dealers
valueHighlights.description: Profiles are vetted and updated so you always know who is authorised to sell and service electric vehicles in Albania.

valueHighlights.title: Complete model data

valueHighlights.title: Decision support
valueHighlights.description: Get practical guides, incentives information and FAQs tailored to Albanian drivers and businesses.

home.insightsSubtitle: Understand how the market is evolving and what that means for your next purchase or fleet upgrade.

insights.title: Charging network
insights.description: Over 120 public charging points are active nationwide, with rapid DC stations connecting the Tirana–Durrës corridor.

insights.title: Total cost of ownership
insights.description: Average energy cost per 100 km with an EV is €2–€3, less than half the fuel spend of comparable petrol vehicles.

insights.title: Maintenance savings
insights.description: Electric drivetrains remove oil changes, exhaust repairs and timing belts—reducing annual workshop visits by up to 40%.

insights.title: Government incentives
insights.description: Customs duties and VAT are waived for new EV imports, while several municipalities offer preferential parking schemes.

home.faqSubtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions we receive from Albanian EV shoppers.

faqItems.question: Do I need a home charger to own an EV?
faqItems.answer: A dedicated wallbox is recommended for daily convenience, but many drivers rely on public AC points or workplace charging.

faqItems.question: How long does the registration process take?
faqItems.answer: Dealers featured on Makina Elektrike handle homologation and registration, usually within two to four working days.

faqItems.question: Can I test drive before committing?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Each verified dealer page includes contact details to book EV test drives across Tirana, Durrës, Shkodër and beyond.

common.questionsTitle: Questions about your rights or this policy?
common.questionsBody: For privacy requests, cookie questions, account support, or dealer onboarding clarifications, contact Makina Elektrike through our contact page or by email at info@makinaelektrike.al.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Makina Elektrike collects, uses, stores, and shares personal data across the public website, account registration, dealer onboarding, favourites, listings, enquiries, dashboards, and analytics features.

sections.title: Scope of this policy
items: This policy applies to visitors, registered users, dealer applicants, approved dealers, and people who contact us through the platform.
It covers public pages, dealer and model pages, saved favourites, listings, blog content, charging-station pages, login flows, and dealer dashboard tools.
It does not replace the separate privacy notices of dealers, manufacturers, payment providers, social platforms, or map providers you may visit through external links.

sections.title: Personal data you provide directly
items: When you create an account, Firebase Authentication processes your sign-in credentials and we receive your email address, account identifier, role, and related profile metadata.

When you apply as a dealer or edit a dealership profile, we may collect company name, contact person, phone number, email address, city, website, showroom address, brands, languages, notes, and uploaded images.
When you submit an enquiry or contact request, we collect the name, email address, phone number if provided, message content, and the listing or dealer reference connected to that request.

sections.title: Data generated through your use of the platform
items: We store favourites for signed-out visitors in local browser storage and, for signed-in users, we may sync favourite item identifiers to the user's Firestore favourites collection.

We collect operational usage information such as page views, navigation patterns, filter interactions, device and browser data, approximate region, referrer information, and session timestamps through analytics and security tooling.
Dealer dashboard activity can generate records such as model links, listing updates, enquiry status changes, uploaded gallery images, and created or updated timestamps.

sections.title: How we use personal data
items: To create and manage accounts, assign platform roles, review dealer applications, and secure access to dashboard features.
To publish, maintain, and improve dealer profiles, EV model pages, vehicle listings, blog content, favourites, and charging-station resources.
To answer support requests, deliver enquiries to the relevant dealer, detect misuse, enforce platform rules, analyse product performance, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: Storage, infrastructure, and service providers
items: Platform data may be processed through services such as Firebase Authentication, Cloud Firestore, Cloud Storage, Firebase Analytics, hosting infrastructure, and Google Maps integrations used on location-based pages.
Some providers may process data outside your country. When that happens, processing depends on the safeguards and contractual protections offered by those providers.
Dealers remain responsible for the personal data they receive directly from shoppers after an enquiry, booking request, or off-platform conversation.

sections.title: When data is shared or made public
items: Approved dealer profiles, public model pages, public listings, blog posts, and related images may be visible to visitors, search engines, and other users of the site.
Dealer contact information and business information may be displayed publicly when a profile is approved and activated on Makina Elektrike.

We may share limited data with trusted processors, hosting providers, analytics providers, law enforcement, regulators, or advisors when reasonably necessary for security, compliance, or legal claims.

sections.title: Retention
items: Account and dealer records are retained while the account or dealership remains active and for a reasonable period afterwards for audit, fraud prevention, backup, and legal compliance purposes.
Support messages, enquiries, moderation notes, and operational records may be retained as long as needed to manage customer service, dealer relationships, disputes, or statutory obligations.
Local browser storage such as favourites or offline queue records remains on your device until you remove it, clear browser data, or the application overwrites that information.

sections.title: Your rights and choices
items: Subject to applicable law, you may request access to, correction of, deletion of, restriction of, or objection to the processing of personal data we hold about you.
You can update some account or dealer profile details directly in the platform, control cookies or local storage through your browser, and ask us to review or remove data where appropriate.
If you want to exercise a privacy right, close an account, deactivate a dealership profile, or ask a question about this policy, contact Makina Elektrike at info@makinaelektrike.al.

privacy.metaDescription: Learn how Makina Elektrike handles account data, dealer onboarding information, favourites, enquiries, analytics, and uploaded content across the platform.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of Makina Elektrike, including public browsing, account registration, dealer onboarding, dealer dashboards, content uploads, listings, enquiries, and related business features.

sections.title: Who may use the platform
items: You may use Makina Elektrike only for lawful purposes and only if you have the legal authority to enter into these terms.
Dealer users must provide accurate, current business and contact information and must have authority to represent the dealership or automotive business they submit.

Approval of a dealer account or listing is not automatic. We may request clarification, deny access, or remove content when information is incomplete, misleading, or inconsistent with platform standards.

sections.title: Accounts and security
items: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for activity that occurs under your account.
You may not share access in a way that impersonates another person, bypasses approval workflows, or grants unauthorised access to protected areas of the platform.
You must notify us promptly if you believe your account, dealership profile, or dashboard access has been used without permission.

sections.title: Public information and platform accuracy
items: Makina Elektrike publishes content about EV dealers, models, listings, charging resources, and related market information for discovery and informational purposes.
Dealers are responsible for the accuracy, legality, ownership rights, and update frequency of the information, photos, logos, descriptions, and claims they publish through their accounts.

Vehicle specifications, prices, incentives, stock availability, and charging information can change quickly, so users should independently verify material facts before making purchase or operational decisions.

sections.title: Acceptable use
items: You may not scrape, bulk download, index, mirror, or systematically republish dealer, model, listing, or editorial content without written permission.
You may not upload unlawful, defamatory, infringing, misleading, malicious, or deceptive content, including false dealership information, unauthorised media, or manipulated listing details.
You may not interfere with the security, stability, moderation systems, analytics, authentication flows, or normal operation of the platform.

sections.title: Dealer-specific obligations
items: Approved dealer users may manage only the dealership presence, public profile fields, models, listings, and enquiry workflows connected to their own approved business account.

Submitting a profile, model, or listing does not guarantee publication, ranking, lead volume, or uninterrupted visibility. We may review, edit, reject, deactivate, or remove content for quality, compliance, or operational reasons.

Once a shopper contacts a dealer, the dealer is responsible for the handling of that relationship, including follow-up communication, pricing discussions, financing offers, warranties, and offline documentation.

sections.title: Intellectual property
items: The Makina Elektrike platform, design, software, editorial structure, and branding are protected by intellectual property laws and remain the property of Makina Elektrike or its licensors.
Dealer names, manufacturer names, logos, model names, and third-party marks remain the property of their respective owners and may not be reused in a misleading way.
Except as expressly allowed by law, you receive a limited, revocable right to access and use the platform for browsing, research, and legitimate business communication only.

sections.title: Disclaimers and limitation of liability
items: The platform is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, complete accuracy, or that every feature will remain available at all times.

Makina Elektrike is not a party to vehicle sales, reservations, financing agreements, charger installations, dealership warranties, or other arrangements negotiated directly between users and dealers.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Makina Elektrike is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or business-interruption losses arising from your use of or inability to use the platform.

sections.title: Suspension, changes, and contact
items: We may suspend or terminate access, remove content, or restrict features if we believe it is necessary for security, legal compliance, operational integrity, or enforcement of these terms.
We may update these terms from time to time. The version published on the website is the controlling version and becomes effective when posted unless a later date is stated.
If you do not agree with updated terms, you should stop using the platform and contact us with any questions at info@makinaelektrike.al.

terms.metaDescription: Review the rules for using Makina Elektrike, including account security, dealer obligations, acceptable use, intellectual property, and liability limits.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Makina Elektrike uses cookies, local storage, analytics tags, and similar technologies to operate the site, remember preferences, secure accounts, and measure performance.

sections.title: What we mean by cookies and similar technologies
items: Cookies are small text files placed on your browser or device. Similar technologies include local storage, browser cache, analytics tags, and SDK-based identifiers.
We use these technologies across public pages, login flows, favourites, dealer dashboards, analytics tooling, and embedded services such as maps.
Some technologies are essential for security and core functionality, while others help us remember preferences or understand how the site is used.

sections.title: Categories of technologies we use
items: Strictly necessary technologies help with authentication, session continuity, fraud prevention, form security, and basic navigation.
Functional technologies remember language preferences, favourites, dashboard state, and other convenience settings that improve repeat visits.
Analytics and performance technologies help us measure page views, referral sources, usage patterns, browser information, and feature adoption so we can improve the platform.

sections.title: Local storage and device-side preferences
items: Makina Elektrike stores some preferences locally in the browser, including favourites for signed-out visitors and offline queue records created by operational tools.
When you sign in, favourites may also be synced to your user profile in Firestore so they can follow your account across sessions and devices.
If you clear browser data or switch devices, these locally stored preferences may be reset or removed.

sections.title: Third-party and embedded services
items: Third-party services such as Firebase, Google Analytics, Google Maps, hosting providers, social links, and embedded external resources may place or read their own cookies or identifiers.
Those providers operate under their own terms and privacy notices, and their technologies may behave differently depending on your browser settings and regional controls.
Opening external websites or social profiles from Makina Elektrike may result in additional cookies being set by those third parties.

sections.title: Your choices
items: Most browsers let you block, limit, or delete cookies and local storage through privacy or site-settings controls.
If you disable essential technologies, parts of the platform may stop working correctly, including login, favourites, dashboard access, maps, or enquiry-related forms.
Privacy modes, content blockers, and browser signals such as Do Not Track can also change how some features behave, but may not fully disable all third-party technologies.

sections.title: Retention of cookies and similar data
items: Session technologies usually expire when you close your browser, while persistent technologies can remain until they expire automatically or you remove them manually.
Local browser storage may remain on your device until cleared, overwritten, or removed through browser settings.
Retention periods can vary depending on whether the technology is operated by Makina Elektrike or by a third-party provider.

sections.title: Policy updates and contact
items: We may update this Cookie Policy when our tools, integrations, or regulatory obligations change.
The version published on the website is the current version and should be reviewed periodically, especially if you use dealer dashboard or account features.
If you have questions about cookies, browser storage, analytics, or tracking on Makina Elektrike, contact us at info@makinaelektrike.al.

cookies.metaDescription: Understand how Makina Elektrike uses cookies, local storage, analytics, and embedded services such as maps across the site and dealer dashboard.

faqItems.question: Do you offer test drives?
faqItems.answer: Most partners can organise test drives within 24–48 hours. Contact the dealer directly to confirm vehicle availability.

faqItems.question: What documents should I bring?
faqItems.answer: Prepare identification, driving licence and (if financing) income documentation so the dealer can process your request quickly.

faqItems.question: Can the dealer help with charging installation?
faqItems.answer: Yes, many dealers collaborate with certified electricians and can coordinate a home or workplace charger installation for you.

modelsPage.title: Electric Models
modelsPage.subtitle: Compare specifications, range and charging speeds for vehicles available in Albania.
modelsPage.noResults: No models found matching your criteria.
modelsPage.metaTitle: Electric car catalogue for Albania | Makina Elektrike

modelsPage.introSubtitle: Filter by body style, range or brand to build a shortlist that matches your driving habits and budget.
modelsPage.insightsSubtitle: Key considerations when comparing electric vehicles side by side.

insights.title: Battery capacity vs. usage
insights.description: City drivers often do well with 50–60 kWh packs, while frequent highway travellers should target 70 kWh or more.

insights.title: Charging curve
insights.description: Look beyond peak kW—steady charging curves reduce downtime on road trips even if the headline figure is moderate.

insights.title: Software & updates
insights.description: Ask whether the vehicle supports over-the-air updates and connected services that improve efficiency over time.

modelsPage.faqSubtitle: Answers to the most common questions from first-time EV buyers.

faqItems.question: What is WLTP and why does it matter?
faqItems.answer: WLTP is the European efficiency cycle. It provides a realistic estimate of range so you can compare models on equal terms.

faqItems.question: Can I filter only by rapid-charging capability?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Use the filters to focus on 100 kW+ DC charging or manually review the charging specifications on each model page.

modelDetails.notFoundDescription: The model you requested no longer exists or has moved.
modelDetails.notFoundBody: The model page you are looking for could not be found.
modelDetails.metaDescription: View detailed data for {{brand}} {{model}} — WLTP range {{range}} km, battery {{battery}} kWh and charging performance.
modelDetails.gallerySubtitle: Swipe through additional photos of this EV.
modelDetails.faqSubtitle: Good to know before requesting a quote or test drive.

faqItems.question: How does cold weather affect the range?
faqItems.answer: Expect a temporary reduction of 10–15% during Albanian winters. Preconditioning and eco driving help maintain range.

faqItems.question: Is the battery covered by warranty?
faqItems.answer: Most manufacturers offer 8-year / 160,000 km coverage, guaranteeing the battery remains above 70% capacity.

faqItems.question: What home charging do I need?
faqItems.answer: A 7.4 kW wallbox on a dedicated circuit is ideal; models supporting 11 kW three-phase charging reduce top-up times further.

blogPage.faqSubtitle: Helpful notes about our editorial process.

faqItems.question: Who writes the articles?
faqItems.answer: Our editorial team collaborates with local experts, dealerships and infrastructure providers to ensure accuracy.

faqItems.question: How often is new content published?
faqItems.answer: We publish fresh stories every week, plus timely updates when new incentives or major models launch.

faqItems.question: Can I suggest a topic?
faqItems.answer: Yes, send us your ideas via the contact form and we will consider them for upcoming guides and interviews.

aboutPage.title: About Makina Elektrike
aboutPage.metaTitle: About Makina Elektrike | EV directory for Albania
aboutPage.metaDescription: Learn how Makina Elektrike connects Albanian drivers with electric vehicles, dealerships and trusted advice.
aboutPage.p1: Makina Elektrike is the premier online directory for electric vehicles in Albania. Our mission is to accelerate the adoption of sustainable transportation by providing a comprehensive, user-friendly platform for prospective buyers.
aboutPage.p2: We connect you with a wide network of official dealerships and importers, offering detailed information on the latest EV models available in the country. From technical specifications to dealership locations, we aim to be your one-stop resource for everything electric.
aboutPage.p3: Whether you're a seasoned EV enthusiast or just starting to explore your options, Makina Elektrike is here to guide you on your journey towards a cleaner, greener future on the road.
aboutPage.p4: Our team monitors market developments, charging infrastructure and policy updates so Albanian consumers and businesses can make informed decisions at every step.

pillars.title: Transparency
pillars.description: We prioritise verified data, clear pricing context and unbiased comparisons for all vehicles and dealers.

pillars.title: Local expertise
pillars.description: Guides and resources are written with Albanian roads, energy costs and regulations in mind.

pillars.title: Continuous innovation
pillars.description: We iterate quickly, adding new tools—from comparison charts to lead tracking—to support the EV ecosystem.

aboutPage.faqSubtitle: More context about our platform and how we work with partners.

faqItems.question: Is Makina Elektrike independent?
faqItems.answer: Yes. We collaborate with dealerships but maintain editorial independence to ensure trustworthy recommendations.

faqItems.question: How can dealers partner with you?
faqItems.answer: Dealers can apply through the registration page; our team verifies credentials and onboards approved partners.

aboutPage.transparencyP1: We work diligently to vet the specifications, dealership details, pricing indicators, and charging ecosystem data that we publish. Even so, EV technology and market availability evolve quickly, so every visitor should treat the information on Makina Elektrike as guidance rather than a guaranteed promise. Listings, incentives, and technical specifications can change without notice, and delays in third-party updates may mean that some pages display data that is no longer current.
aboutPage.transparencyP2: By using our platform, you acknowledge that the content is offered on an "as is, as available" basis without warranties of any kind. We encourage shoppers, dealers, and partners to contact manufacturers or official representatives to confirm critical facts before making purchasing or operational decisions. Trademarks and logos referenced throughout the site remain the property of their respective owners, and no endorsement or partnership should be inferred unless explicitly stated.
aboutPage.transparencyP3: If you discover an omission or inaccuracy, please let us know through our contact page. We continually refine our editorial process to keep the community informed while respecting ownership rights, and we may update or remove materials at any time if we believe doing so protects the integrity of the information we provide.
aboutPage.collaborationCtaDescription: We are open to new collaboration opportunities based on the needs of dealers, fleets, transportation services, taxi companies, and users.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.metaDescription: Get in touch with Makina Elektrike for partnerships, media enquiries or EV support in Albania.
contactPage.p1: Have a question, feedback, or a business inquiry? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to us via the channels below, and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

highlights.title: Partnership enquiries
highlights.description: Dealerships, charging providers and service partners can collaborate with us to reach more EV customers.

highlights.title: Media & press
highlights.description: We provide commentary on the Albanian EV market and can connect you with local experts for interviews.

highlights.title: Community support
highlights.description: Need help choosing an EV or charger? Send us your questions and we will point you to the right resources.

contactPage.ctaDescription: Use the form below for support, corrections, partnerships, or media requests.

form.title: Send us a message
form.subtitle: We usually reply within 1-2 business days.
form.success: Your message has been sent successfully.
form.error: We could not send your message. Please try again.

contactPage.faqSubtitle: Key information about response times and support.

faqItems.question: How fast will you reply?
faqItems.answer: We respond to most enquiries within one working day, prioritising urgent support for existing partners.

faqItems.question: Do you offer phone consultations?
faqItems.answer: Yes, book a call via email and our team will schedule a session to discuss your EV plans in detail.

faqItems.question: Where are you based?
faqItems.answer: Our core team operates from Tirana, with partner support across other major Albanian cities.

registerDealerPage.metaDescription: Apply to join Makina Elektrike as an authorised electric vehicle dealer in Albania.
registerDealerPage.title: Dealer registration
registerDealerPage.subtitle: Submit your details to join Makina Elektrike as a trusted electric vehicle dealer.
benefits: Reach EV buyers across Albania with localised, SEO-friendly listings.
Publish detailed model information and update inventory in real time.
Access marketing support, analytics, and lead notifications from our team.

fields.notesPlaceholder: Tell us about your inventory, specialties, and experience.

registerDealerPage.success: Registration received. Our team will review your dealership information shortly.

favoritesPage.title: Your favourites
favoritesPage.subtitle: Keep track of the dealers and models that best fit your electric mobility plans.
favoritesPage.noDealers: You have not saved any dealers yet.
favoritesPage.noModels: You have not saved any models yet.
favoritesPage.noListings: You have not saved any listings yet.
favoritesPage.emptyTextModels: Browse our models and click the heart icon to save them here for quick access later.
favoritesPage.emptyTextListings: Browse our live listings and click the heart icon to save them here for quick access later.
favoritesPage.emptyTextDealers: Browse our dealers and click the heart icon to save them here for quick access later.
favoritesPage.metaTitle: Saved electric dealers & models | Makina Elektrike
favoritesPage.metaDescription: Review your bookmarked EV dealerships and vehicles in one place and continue your research with ease.
favoritesPage.introSubtitle: Use favourites to compare offers, plan test drives and keep important links handy across devices.
favoritesPage.insightsSubtitle: Make the most of your saved list before visiting showrooms.

insights.title: Group by priority
insights.description: Tag or note why each dealer or model stood out so you can discuss the right topics during follow-up calls.

insights.title: Share with your family
insights.description: Send your list to family members or colleagues to gather feedback before making a purchase decision.

insights.title: Update after test drives
insights.description: Remove models that no longer fit and add notes about driving impressions to track your progress.

favoritesPage.faqSubtitle: How to manage your personalised EV watchlist.

faqItems.question: Can I export my favourites?
faqItems.answer: Yes, copy the list or capture a screenshot before sharing it with dealerships or advisors.

faqItems.question: Do favourites sync across devices?
faqItems.answer: Once logged in, your saved dealers and models are available on desktop and mobile.

faqItems.question: How many items can I save?
faqItems.answer: There is no hard limit—save as many dealers and models as you need while researching.

favoritesPage.shareMessage: Here are {{count}} electric picks I am considering from Makina Elektrike.
favoritesPage.shareError: Unable to share favorites right now.
favoritesPage.noItemsToExport: Add dealers or models to your favorites to export them.
favoritesPage.compareInstruction: Select up to 3 models to compare them side by side.
favoritesPage.emptyText: Browse our {{tab}} and click the heart icon to save them here for quick access later.

auth.awaitingApprovalDescription: Thanks for registering! Your account is pending approval. We will notify you once an administrator reviews your request.
auth.awaitingMetaDescription: Your application is under review. We will activate access to Makina Elektrike as soon as the verification is complete.
auth.awaitingNextSteps: You can continue gathering documents or reach out to our team if you need to update your submission while we complete the review.

errors.emailInUse: This email address is already registered. Use another email or sign in to your existing account.
errors.weakPassword: The password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.invalidCredentials: The email address or password is incorrect.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
errors.networkFailed: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.profileLoad: Failed to load your user profile.

admin.loginInfo: Secure area for administrators and approved dealers. Accounts are monitored and protected with activity logging.
admin.metaDescription: Sign in to manage dealers, models and content for Makina Elektrike.
admin.dashboardMetaDescription: Manage dealer profiles, EV models, blog content and approvals for the Makina Elektrike platform.
admin.dealersOverviewDescription: Filter and review dealers by activation state or approval status. Actions update in real time.
admin.noDealersForFilter: No dealers match this filter yet.
admin.bulkDeleteSelectedConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the selected items?
admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
admin.name: Name
admin.searchStations: Search stations by address or operator...
admin.activationModalHint: Enter an email and password to create the dealer account. The dealer will be able to log in with these credentials.
admin.imageUploadHint: JPEG or PNG recommended, up to 5MB.
admin.offlineQueueDescription: These entries were saved locally after Firebase rejected a write. Download or copy them and import manually via the Firebase console or CLI.
admin.offlineQueueEmpty: No pending submissions are stored locally. When Firebase rejects a write, the payload will appear here.
admin.offlineQueueEmptyState: All caught up! There are no offline submissions waiting for manual import.
admin.offlineQueueEntryRemoved: Entry removed from the offline queue.
admin.offlineQueueCopyFailed: Failed to copy the offline queue.
admin.offlineQueueCopyUnavailable: Clipboard access is not available in this browser.
admin.prefillDisabled: Prefill available once per new model.
admin.apiError: Unable to fetch EV data. Please try again.
admin.mediaRequired: Add at least one image URL or upload a cover image.

bulkImport.missingMapping: Please map all required columns before importing.
bulkImport.dealerProfileMissing: Your dealer profile must be loaded before importing models.
bulkImport.failed: Import failed. Please review the errors and try again.
bulkImport.templateDescription: Prepare a spreadsheet with the following column headers before uploading.
bulkImport.errorUnsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Please upload a CSV or Excel file.
bulkImport.errorNoHeaders: No headers were detected in the file. Please include a header row.
bulkImport.errorNoRows: No data rows were found after parsing the file.

blogTextImport.title: How to use text bulk import
instructions: Download the template to see the exact required text format.
Write your blog posts in the `.txt` file following the structure.
For multiple blog posts, separate them with `=== BLOG ===` and `=== END BLOG ===` markers.
Upload the completed `.txt` file below. You can refine translations later by editing each post individually.
blogTextImport.noBlocksFound: No blocks starting with '=== BLOG ===' were found.
blogTextImport.missingTitleOrSlug: Missing Title or Slug in the header.
blogTextImport.partialSuccess: Import completed with {{count}} errors. Check the console for details.
